title: Session Inspector Timeline UI
consumer_purpose: Replace terminal scrollback with an inspectable runtime event ledger showing all bus events in structured, filterable, correlated form
claim_atoms: InspectorContext stores ALL events (not just active session-relevant)
EventDetailDrawer shows full event payload with parent/child navigation
content:
## Plan: Session Inspector Timeline UI

### Files to create:

1. **`packages/app/src/context/inspector.tsx`** — Inspector context provider
   - Normalized event store with 10K cap
   - Filtering (by event category, status, tool, file, phase, actor, time)
   - Event correlation (parent/child by callID)
   - Stats aggregation
   - Subscription to SDK event stream via `useServerSDK().event.on()`

2. **`packages/app/src/components/inspector/inspector-page.tsx`** — Page layout composing all components
   - Three-panel layout: sidebar (session list), main (timeline table), right drawer (detail)
   - Empty states, error boundaries

3. **`packages/app/src/components/inspector/timeline-table.tsx`** — Main virtual-scrolling event table
   - Columns: timestamp, event type, actor, phase, tool, file, status, duration, error
   - Sortable by timestamp (default desc)
   - Click row to select and open detail drawer
   - Color-coded status badges
   - Virtual scrolling via scroll container

4. **`packages/app/src/components/inspector/timeline-filters.tsx`** — Filter bar
   - Event category filter (grouped: tool.*, file.*, permission.*, lifecycle.*, agent.*, mcp.*, errors, coordination.*, session.*, system.*)
   - Status filter (all/started/succeeded/failed/denied)
   - Tool name search
   - File path search
   - Quick filters: errors only, tool calls only, file edits only
   - Actor filter

5. **`packages/app/src/components/inspector/event-detail-drawer.tsx`** — Detail slide-out panel
   - Human-readable summary header
   - Structured fields display
   - Raw JSON tab
   - Parent event link
   - Child events list

6. **`packages/app/src/components/inspector/session-list.tsx`** — Session list sidebar
   - Shows sessions with metadata
   - Click to filter inspector for that session

### Files to modify:

7. **`packages/app/src/app.tsx`** — Add InspectorProvider wrapper and /:dir/inspector route

### Types:

- RuntimeEvent: normalized event with id, type, category, timestamp, sessionID, status, tool, file, actor, phase, duration, error, raw payload, callID (for correlation), parentID
- InspectorFilters: eventCategories[], status[], toolQuery, fileQuery, sessionID, actor, timeRange, showErrorsOnly, showToolCallsOnly, showFileEditsOnly

### Event category mapping:
- tool.* → Tool Calls
- file.* → Files
- permission.* → Permissions  
- lifecycle.*/phase.* → Lifecycle
- session.next.* → Agent (includes tool calls, steps, text, reasoning)
- mcp.* → MCP
- coordination.* → Coordination
- session.* → Session
- server.*/pty.* → System
- Errors: any with error/status=failed

### Event correlation:
- session.next.tool.called → session.next.tool.success/failed via callID
- session.next.step.started → session.next.step.ended via sessionID
- permission.asked → permission.replied via callID (from properties)
